name: whiteboard.listSnapshots
description: List persisted whiteboard snapshots archived when brainstorm sessions were closed. Returns snapshots visible to the current user, optionally filtered by room or session.

room_id.description: Filter snapshots by whiteboard room ID (optional).

session_id.description: Filter snapshots by brainstorm session ID (optional).

limit.description: Maximum number of snapshots to return. Defaults to 50.

org_id.description: Organization ID for scoping (optional, uses session).

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session).
